name: HomeTrust Bancshares, Inc.
business: HomeTrust Bancshares, Inc. is a bank holding company that operates HomeTrust Bank, offering deposit accounts and loans to individuals, businesses, and nonprofits. Its principal business consists of attracting deposits and investing in commercial real estate loans, construction loans, commercial and industrial loans, equipment finance leases, municipal leases, residential mortgages, home equity lines of credit, and consumer loans. The company also originates one-to-four family loans, SBA loans, and HELOCs for sale to third parties, and invests in debt securities.

exposures.sentence: Beyond traditional financial institutions, we also face competition from financial technology companies, or fintechs.
